changelogversion.changelogtext: Added a dedicated beta release channel with its own package name so stable and beta can be installed side by side.
Connected stable and beta release automation to separate Firebase app configs in GitHub Actions.
Made in-app release checks follow stable and beta tags independently.
Fixed package-scoped search intents and beta shortcuts so release-specific actions resolve correctly.
Hardened release minification rules to avoid Jsoup optional dependency failures during signed release builds.
Restored the richer Hayai manga metadata screen on top of the current metadata model.
Reintroduced the Compose manga editor with tracker autofill, grouped fields, and reset actions.
Recovered the redesigned onboarding flow and normalized more Hayai branding paths.
Improved fuzzy search across the library, categories, and migration flows.
Moved automatic app update checks into a single startup policy and cleaned release asset selection.
Cleaned remaining fork regressions in About, workflows, issue templates, and theme selection.
